title: LocalAIFactory — Enterprise Readiness Scorecard
asOfCommit: R2-ACC-20X sprint: chat-import learning extractor (tested), 3 new installable knowledge packs (real-installer tested), KYC/AML->transaction-approval benchmark fixture (Gold 7/7), /Support ops dashboard, edition/license model (tested), safe local fix loop (rollback-proven, tested), diagnostics/load/reliability/security scripts run live, multi-agent + market-intelligence + SSO design docs
changeLog: R2-ACC-20X-FINAL-COMPLETION raised scores ONLY where shipped, tested, live-verified evidence improved: Technical POC 85->87 (235 tests, KYC/AML fixture Gold 7/7, /Support in UI smoke, publish 151 files/45 MB), Autonomous 45->55 (LocalFixLoop: isolated workspace + rollback proven incl. created-file deletion + path-escape rejection + never-commit, 5 tests + operator script), Supportability 50->60 (read-only /Support dashboard live in UI smoke + diagnostics suite run live: system-snapshot/gpu/ollama/sql/performance), Commercial Product 25->30 (edition/license model implemented+tested + edition matrix), Packaging/Licensing 15->30 (LicenseVerifier demo-safe + edition matrix + publish/package proven), Banking/Finance 65->70 (KYC/AML->transaction-approval fixture Gold 7/7), Data/Knowledge Governance 80->82 (3 new installable packs real-installer-tested + chat-learning propose-not-overwrite extractor), Scalability 40->45 (load/reliability smoke run live: 0 failures, stable timing), Security 75->76 (security-audit.ps1 live: 0 HIGH findings + threat model/pentest-readiness docs), UX/Demo 60->62 (Support dashboard + screenshot capture script + user/admin/operator/developer manuals). Honest non-raises: Document/OCR 35 (no trained CV model), Cross-System/Estate 45 (no estate model), Enterprise Product 30 (no SSO/production), screenshots NOT generated (Node/Playwright absent — documented blocker). No area reaches 100; nothing raised without reproducible evidence.
honestyNote: Scores are deliberately conservative. 100 requires implemented + tested + demonstrated + documented + reviewable. Domain and commercial areas are intentionally modest because they are knowledge/design today, not shipped capability.

areas.name: Technical POC Readiness

criteria.75: builds + broad tests + benchmark + live HTTP/DB evidence
criteria.90: + automated UI smoke + reproducible verify script

evidence: benchmark standard suite PASS (KYC/AML fixture Gold 7/7)
areas.proofRequiredFor100: Independent technical reviewer reproduces build+test+benchmark+UI smoke and signs the POC evidence pack.

areas.name: Controlled Pilot Readiness

criteria.75: + backup/restore + supportability + install runbook
criteria.90: + pilot run on real estate data with sign-off

evidence: install-localdb/sqlexpress demos + onboarding/admin/user guides + support runbook
blockers: no controlled pilot executed on real estate data yet
IIS install is operator-gated dry-run (not executed here)
areas.proofRequiredFor100: A controlled pilot executed on real (sanitized) estate data with the operations runbook, a full backup/restore drill, and stakeholder sign-off.

areas.name: Enterprise Product Readiness

criteria.75: ops + SSO/IdP + scale tested

areas.proofRequiredFor100: Production deployment with SSO, estate model, load testing, SLAs, and an external operational audit.

areas.name: Commercial Product Readiness

criteria.75: + pricing + support model + installer

areas.proofRequiredFor100: Licensing + packaging + support model + at least one repeatable commercial deployment.

areas.name: Autonomous Engineering Readiness

criteria.75: fix→build→test loop in a sandbox
criteria.100: + demonstrated safe autonomous fixes on real repos

evidence: ControlledExecutor: allowlist-only, halts on failure, never promotes (4 tests)
LocalFixLoop: applies patch to isolated workspace, runs allowlisted checks, ROLLS BACK on failure (incl. deleting created files), rejects path-escape, NEVER commits/pushes (5 tests)
blockers: fix loop proven on a synthetic temp workspace, not yet on a real estate repository
execute-mode against a real worktree is operator-gated and not yet demonstrated end-to-end
areas.proofRequiredFor100: The fix loop demonstrated end-to-end on a real (sanitized) estate repository: locate->patch->build/test->human approval->commit or rollback, with the audit trail captured.

areas.name: Security and Access Control Readiness

criteria.75: Windows auth + RBAC + project access + server-side enforcement + audit + IDOR guard + tests

evidence: R2-P0B: Negotiate auth, UserRole RBAC, ProjectAccess, deny-by-default, append-only AuditEvent, IDOR regression test, AccessDenied 403
areas.proofRequiredFor100: Enterprise IdP/SSO integration plus an independent penetration test and security audit.

areas.name: Audit and Governance Readiness

criteria.75: append-only audit of who/what/when/which-project/denied + knowledge provenance + source registry

areas.proofRequiredFor100: Tamper-evident audit (e.g. hash-chaining), retention policy, and an external governance review.

areas.name: Data and Knowledge Governance Readiness

criteria.75: permanence (propose-never-overwrite) + versioning + provenance + source registry + validation

areas.proofRequiredFor100: PII classification + retention + DLP policy with external data-governance audit.

areas.name: Deployment Readiness

criteria.75: + automated install/package + config mgmt + backup/restore
criteria.90: + blue/green or staged rollout + health gates

evidence: dotnet publish proven (142 files/45MB, packs+scorecard bundled)
scripts/release install/package/verify/uninstall-dryrun + IIS dry-run + 5 deployment/runbook guides
blockers: no proven end-to-end PRODUCTION rollout (LocalDB-verified; Express/full-SQL/Docker/IIS not executed on this host)
areas.proofRequiredFor100: A proven, repeatable production rollout (IIS or Docker) with a backup/restore drill and health gates on a server edition.

areas.name: Supportability and Operations Readiness

criteria.50: health cache + request timing + structured logs
criteria.75: + supportability dashboard + diagnostics export + alerting

areas.proofRequiredFor100: Supportability dashboard + diagnostics bundle + alerting/SLOs operated over a sustained period.

areas.name: Benchmark and Evidence Credibility

criteria.75: pinned repos + golden snapshots + Bronze/Silver/Gold + CI exit codes + deterministic
criteria.90: + tiered suites + many approved repos + multi-language

evidence: 6 pinned items (4 repos + 2 synthetic bridge fixtures)
C# and Python ↔ SQL bridge fixtures (Gold 4/4)
blockers: still few baseline repos; only synthetic fixtures exercise the bridge
no externally reproduced run; public multi-language repos remain gap-only candidates
areas.proofRequiredFor100: More approved public repos across tiers (incl. multi-language) and an externally reproduced run.

areas.name: Business Workflow Consulting Capability

criteria.75: + scenario suite + evaluation rubric + worked designs

areas.proofRequiredFor100: Repeatable consulting engagements producing measured, evidenced outcomes.

areas.name: Banking / Finance Domain Capability

criteria.75: + banking scenarios + reconciliation/leasing/insurance designs

evidence: core-banking-integration fixture (Gold 6/6: posting/mandate/claim/settlement/reconciliation impact answered by the bridge)
blockers: fixtures are synthetic; no delivered banking component on a real core system
awareness-only on regulation; not compliance certified
areas.proofRequiredFor100: A delivered, tested banking workflow component deployed for a real institution.

areas.name: Document Intelligence / OCR Capability

criteria.75: + working OCR pipeline prototype with human review
criteria.90: + measured precision/recall on a governed set

evidence: R2-ACC-CAP4 PDF analyzer (hash/classify text-vs-scanned/provenance) + extractive summarizer (no hallucination), tested
R2-ACC-CAP5 cheque risk-triage engine (detection≠verification, human-review-required, never a fraud verdict), tested
blockers: no real CV/OCR model yet — PDF text extraction needs a parser library; cheque engine reasons over OCR DTOs a future CV service would populate
areas.proofRequiredFor100: Production OCR/PDF pipeline (real CV) with provenance, human review, and measured precision/recall on a governed set.

areas.name: Legacy Modernization Capability

criteria.50: + assessment method for a supported language
criteria.75: + automated extraction for the legacy language

areas.proofRequiredFor100: Legacy-language extraction + assisted migration with behavioural parity tests, delivered on a real app.

areas.name: Repository Understanding Capability

criteria.75: C#/T-SQL symbols + references + graph + impact + retrieval + coverage/gap, benchmark Gold

evidence: R2-ACC-CAP1 C#↔SQL bridge (AccessesSql edges, both directions, tested + benchmark fixture Gold)
R2-ACC-CAP3 Python extractor (classes/async/FastAPI + Python↔SQL bridge, benchmark fixture Gold)
blockers: C#/T-SQL/Python now supported; VB.NET/Oracle PL/SQL/Razor still gap-only
areas.proofRequiredFor100: Full semantic resolution + the remaining languages (VB/Oracle), validated externally across diverse estates.

areas.name: Cross-System / Estate Understanding Capability

criteria.75: + cross-repo estate model + shared-DB identity
criteria.100: + validated estate model over the real estate

evidence: R2-ACC-CAP1/CAP3 code↔schema linking within a repo (C# and Python methods linked to SQL tables/procs with evidence)
blockers: linking is within a single repo/project; no cross-REPOSITORY estate model yet (R2-P2)
no shared-DB cross-system linking across BDM/MCIB/ETAMS/ChequeXpert
areas.proofRequiredFor100: Cross-repository estate model with shared-DB identity, validated across the real estate.

areas.name: User Experience / Demo Readiness

criteria.75: + Base Knowledge + Readiness + graph explorer + HTTP smoke + demo script
criteria.90: + polished demo dataset + Playwright UI tests

evidence: working MVC UI: dashboard, projects, graph explorer, coverage, Base Knowledge, Readiness
blockers: no Playwright browser tests yet (HTTP smoke only)
areas.proofRequiredFor100: Playwright UI tests + accessibility review + user-tested demo flow.

areas.name: Scalability and Performance Readiness

criteria.50: bounded queries + sub-second core pages + large-import streaming
criteria.75: + load/perf testing + capacity guidance
criteria.90: + horizontal scale + tuned for large estates

areas.proofRequiredFor100: Load/performance testing and validated operation at enterprise scale.

areas.name: Commercial Packaging and Licensing Readiness

criteria.75: + packaging + entitlement + support tiers

areas.proofRequiredFor100: Licensing + entitlement + packaging + support tiers operating repeatably.

areas.name: Enterprise ERP / Infrastructure Advisory Capability

criteria.75: + honest comparison matrix + evaluation rubric + worked advisory designs

evidence: erp-crm-industrial fixture (Gold 6/6: the bridge answers 'what services touch SalesOrder', 'impact of Customer change', report/workflow/approval dependencies)
blockers: fixtures are synthetic; no delivered ERP/infra engagement
areas.proofRequiredFor100: Delivered ERP/infrastructure advisory engagements on real customer systems with measured outcomes.

areas.name: Vendor-Style Solution Design Capability

criteria.50: structured solution designs via playbooks + scenarios
criteria.75: + rubric-scored consultant-grade designs with evidence

blockers: designs are advisory, not yet delivered/tested as built solutions
areas.proofRequiredFor100: Rubric-scored blueprints implemented, tested, and deployed as real solutions.
